author: phase-4-coordinator
content: Added mixed-type (promoted) arithmetic ufuncs in new ferray-ufunc/src/promoted.rs module. The compile-time promotion machinery already existed in ferray-core (Promoted trait for result-type resolution, PromoteTo for element casting); this is the glue that wires it into the ufunc layer. New functions: add_promoted, subtract_promoted, multiply_promoted, divide_promoted. Canonical example from the issue works: add_promoted of an i32 array and an f64 array promotes to f64. 8 new unit tests covering (i32,f64), (f32,f64), (i16,f32), (u8,f64) pairings plus same-type identity, 2-D shape preservation, and shape mismatch error. Output type bound is Float which covers every mixed int+float and f32+f64 case; pure int+int promotion is unusual for ufuncs and callers can cast explicitly. 244 lib tests (up from 236) + 50/19/53 integration tests pass. Clippy clean. Broadcasting on the promoted path is deferred until a concrete caller needs it.
